Furthermore, the patient is not prescribed any lipid-lowering medications (e.g., statins), and no specific lipid panel results are noted in the current record. According to the refined criteria, general risk factors (Morbid obesity, Diabetes) and associated conditions (Hypertensive heart disease) alone are insufficient to predict a future diagnosis of Disorders of Lipid Metabolism. Therefore, based strictly on the explicit evidence present in the current record, the prediction must be "No".
